cards.title: Europe's Best Trips Start Where Tourists Don't
cards.caption: Hidden towns, quiet mountain villages, untouched coastlines. The most memorable European journeys begin far from the famous landmarks. Where's your under-the-radar find? Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: Europe's most memorable journeys often begin far from the famous landmarks.

cards.title: Next Stop: Owschlag
cards.caption: A place name so strange it stops you mid-scroll, unless you live there.
cards.quote: Next stop Owschlag, one of those place names which seems so strange. Unless you live there.

cards.title: More Parisians Bike Than Drive
cards.caption: In Paris, more people now travel by bicycle than by car. The city quietly flipped. Would your city ever pull this off? Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: More People Travel by Bicycle Than by Car in Paris.

cards.title: Travel Beats Work For Making Friends
cards.caption: New study of 5,000 adults: travel has overtaken work, school, and mutual friends as the #1 place people form meaningful new relationships. Who's your best travel-made friend? Via Threadverse.
cards.quote: Travel has overtaken work, university and even mutual friends as the number one place where people form meaningful new relationships.
cards.povText: POV: your closest friend is someone you met on a trip

cards.title: 50 Days. 50 Nights. All Of Europe.
cards.caption: Rick Steves spent nearly two months researching Europe, then went live to 3,000+ travelers to share every story and lesson. The trip report is a masterclass. Surfaced by Threadverse.

cards.title: The UK's Best City Break Isn't London
cards.caption: Not London. Not Manchester. The UK's best city break is a place most people underrate entirely. Bold call, or dead right? Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: UK's best city break is 'underrated' gem - not London or Manchester

cards.title: Butter Chicken, Homemade
cards.caption: A homemade Murg Makhni recipe, learned on a cooking course while traveling India.

cards.title: Perfect Symmetry At Whitechapel
cards.caption: Someone who notices the quiet moments most commuters rush past, a perfectly symmetrical frame on the London Underground. Travel is in the details. Surfaced by Threadverse.
cards.quote: I love noticing little moments of symmetry as I travel on the London Underground network.
